description: Development ratio (m/kt), quantitative; lower is better
Explosive consumption (kg/t), quantitative; lower is better
Ore loss rate (%), quantitative; lower is better
Ore dilution rate (%), quantitative; lower is better
Mining plus backfill cost (CNY/t), quantitative; lower is better
Safety index (0-1), qualitative/semi-quantitative; higher is better
Workflow simplicity/complexity score (0-1); higher is simpler
Cycle continuity/time score (0-1); higher is better
1 for highest target_score in each case, otherwise 0
